testcases.input: arr = [100,-23,-23,404,100,23,23,23,3,404] Output: 3 Explanation: You need three jumps from index 0 --> 4 --> 3 --> 9. Note that index 9 is the last index of the array.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: You need three jumps from index 0 --> 4 --> 3 --> 9. Note that index 9 is the last index of the array.

testcases.input: arr = [7] Output: 0 Explanation: Start index is the last index. You do not need to jump.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: Start index is the last index. You do not need to jump.

testcases.input: arr = [7,6,9,6,9,6,9,7] Output: 1 Explanation: You can jump directly from index 0 to index 7 which is last index of the array.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: You can jump directly from index 0 to index 7 which is last index of the array.
